step_rationale: ApoB-containing lipoprotein; retained subendothelially and oxidized, initiating atherogenesis.
mechanism: Large VLDL particles are ApoB-containing lipoproteins that accumulate in the arterial intima, undergo oxidation, and initiate atherosclerotic plaque formation and destabilization.

references.title: High-frequency metabolite profiling and the incidence of recurrent cardiac events in patients with post-acute coronary syndrome.
references.journal: Biomarkers : biochemical indicators of exposure, response, and susceptibility to chemicals
